title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Qualcomm India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Qualcomm India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
